items.text: Further, we intend to continue to implement platform initiatives across our apartment communities as part of our business strategy.
items.rationale: States an intention to continue implementing platform initiatives as part of strategy; it is descriptive context rather than itself identifying a specific risk.

items.text: Once implemented, platform initiatives may not perform as we expect.
items.rationale: Introduces a specific new risk that platform initiatives may fail to perform as expected, a concrete business risk not previously described.

items.text: We may also overestimate the revenue (or expense savings) that such platform initiatives may generate.
items.rationale: Adds a specific new risk of overestimating revenue or expense savings from platform initiatives, a distinct financial risk element.

items.text: In the last few years, we have transformed our executive team by elevating several internal candidates to key leadership positions.
items.rationale: This is a factual/historical statement about executive succession, not a description of a risk to the business.

items.text: A failure to keep pace with developments in technology could impair our operations or competitive position.
items.rationale: Introduces a concrete new risk that failing to keep pace with technology could impair operations or competitive position.

items.text: Our business continues and will continue to demand the use of sophisticated systems, software and technology, including artificial intelligence.
items.rationale: Specifically calls out reliance on sophisticated systems including artificial intelligence, adding a new and currently material risk dimension not previously mentioned.

items.text: These systems, software and technologies must be refined, updated and replaced on a regular basis in order for us to meet our business requirements, our residents’ demands and expectations, and regulatory requirements.
items.rationale: Elaborates on the technology risk by noting the need for continuous refinement and updates, expanding on the risk already introduced.

items.text: If we are unable to do so on a timely basis or at a reasonable cost, or fail to do so, our business could suffer.
items.rationale: Further details the consequences of failing to update technology, extending the previously introduced technology risk.

items.text: Also, we may not achieve the benefits that we anticipate from any new system, software or technology, and a failure to do so could result in higher than anticipated costs or could adversely affect our results of operations.
items.rationale: Continues elaborating on the technology risk by addressing potential failure to realize anticipated benefits and cost impacts.
